name: Best Card Team
description_short: Best Card Team is a merchant payment processor specializing in tailored card acceptance solutions for dental and medical practices, endorsed by 50+ professional associations.
description_long:
Best Card Team operates as a payment processing and merchant services provider focused exclusively on the healthcare practitioner market, particularly dental practices. The company has built its reputation by positioning itself as an alternative to generic merchant service providers that the company claims don't adequately serve healthcare practices' financial needs.

Best Card offers a comprehensive suite of payment acceptance solutions designed for medical and dental offices. Their core product, BCPay, provides multiple payment methods including countertop terminals, mobile payments, and contactless card acceptance. Additional features include text-to-pay and web payment capabilities, automatic posting to practice management software, secure card storage for collections, and the ability to process scheduled and recurring payments. The company emphasizes competitive equipment pricing and claims to deliver significant cost savings compared to standard merchant processors.

The company distinguishes itself through strategic partnerships with professional healthcare associations—claiming endorsement by the American Dental Association Member Advantage and more than 50 dental and medical associations. They market exclusive member pricing, equipment discounts, and notably advertise no termination fees. Best Card claims to have served over 10,000 dental practices and markets that the average practice saves 26% or $6,795 annually through their services.

Based on available information, Best Card is a merchant services processor rather than a credit card issuer in the traditional sense. While they facilitate card payments and may offer branded payment solutions, the website content focuses on payment processing infrastructure rather than credit card products themselves. The company emphasizes transaction security, PCI compliance support, and streamlined implementation for practices.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Endorsed by American Dental Association Member Advantage and 50+ dental and medical associations
Claims average savings of $6,795 annually (26%) compared to competitors
Multiple payment methods: countertop, mobile, contactless, text-to-pay, web payments
Automatic posting integration with popular practice management software
Exclusive member pricing and equipment discounts through association partnerships
Fast implementation: sign-up in minutes with one-hour installation
cons: Heavily specialized for dental and medical practices—not suitable for general consumers or other business types
Website provides no specific pricing information or APR/fee transparency
No consumer testimonials provided—only vague 'what other practices say' section with no actual quotes or data shown
Claims of savings (26%/$6,795) lack supporting methodology or third-party verification
Focus on merchant services means this is a B2B solution, not a consumer finance product
best_for: Dental practices seeking to reduce merchant processing costs and simplify payment acceptance
Medical practices associated with endorsed professional organizations
Healthcare practices needing integrated payment software with practice management system compatibility
diagnosis: Best Card Team is a merchant services processor designed exclusively for dental and medical practices seeking to reduce payment processing costs and streamline payment acceptance. The primary caveat is that this is a B2B solution for healthcare practitioners, not a consumer-facing credit card or financing product, making it inappropriate for individuals seeking personal credit solutions.
services: Merchant payment processing for card transactions
Secure card storage for patient/client payment data
Equipment sales and leasing with competitive pricing
Member discount programs through association partnerships
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 6455 S Yosemite St Ste 600, Greenwood Village, CO 80111
